nodes.title: Medical Certificate
nodes.description: Get a medical examination from an LTO-accredited physician.
requirements: Valid government ID (your Digital National ID works)
Personal appearance at an LTO-accredited clinic
steps: Find an LTO-accredited medical clinic near you
Present your Digital National ID
Undergo the medical examination (vision, hearing, physical)
Receive your electronically transmitted medical certificate

nodes.title: Theoretical Driving Course (TDC)
nodes.description: Complete the mandatory 15-hour theoretical driving course.
requirements: 15 hours of instruction at an LTO-accredited driving school or free at LTO Driver's Education Center
steps: Choose an accredited driving school or LTO Driver's Education Center (free)
Attend the 15-hour theoretical course
Pass the course assessment
Receive your TDC certificate

nodes.title: Student Permit
nodes.description: Apply for your Student Permit at an LTO office.
requirements: Must be at least 16 years old
steps: Go to any LTO Licensing Center
Submit medical certificate and TDC certificate
Have your photo and signature captured
Pay the fee and receive your Student Permit

nodes.title: Practical Driving Course (PDC)
nodes.description: Complete at least 8 hours of hands-on driving instruction.
requirements: Valid Student Permit (held for at least 30 days before license exam)
8 hours minimum practical instruction at an accredited driving school
steps: Enroll at an LTO-accredited driving school
Complete at least 8 hours of practical driving
Pass the school's practical assessment
Receive your PDC certificate

nodes.title: Non-Pro License Application & Exams
nodes.description: Take the written and practical exams for your Non-Professional Driver's License.
requirements: Student Permit held at least 30 days
steps: Return to the LTO Licensing Center
Take and pass the written examination
Take and pass the practical driving examination
Pay license fees

nodes.title: License Release
steps: Wait for license card production
Receive SMS notification when ready
Claim your license or receive it via courier
